# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Read `AGENTS.md` first and follow it strictly. `AGENTS.md` is the authoritative instruction file for this Java 8 to Java 21 migration.

Use `docs/java21-migration.md` as the migration tracker and prompt reference.

Preserve Java 8 behavior unless the user explicitly requests and approves a behavior change.

Keep Copilot suggestions small, migration-focused, behavior-preserving, and aligned with the current migration step.
